name: Chocolate Mallow Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine all ingredients, except marshmallows, in a mixing bowl.
2. Blend at the lowest speed for 30 seconds.
3. Beat on medium speed for an additional 2 minutes until smooth.
4. Spread batter into a 10 x 6-inch baking dish.
5. Microwave at 50% (Medium) power for 6 minutes.
- Rotate the dish 1/4 turn every 3 minutes.
6. Increase microwave power to high and cook for 2 to 5 more minutes until set.
7. Let stand directly on the countertop for 5 to 10 minutes.
8. Arrange marshmallows, cut side down, close together over the cake.
9. Cool completely before frosting with Chocolate Frosting.
10. For frosting: In a small mixing bowl, combine chocolate, butter, and milk.
- Microwave at 50% (Medium) power for 3 to 4 minutes or until the chocolate is soft and mixture is thick, stirring after half the time.
- Stir in remaining ingredients. Let stand for 5 to 10 minutes.
11. Beat until smooth and spreadable consistency, about 1 to 3 minutes.
12. Frost tops of 2 layers or 24 cupcakes.
